title: Woet Wooden Stacking Toy – 8-Piece Educational Stacking Tower with Rings for Toddlers 12 Months+ – FSC, Pastel Colors, Non-Toxic Paint – Montessori Gift for Boys and Girls STEM Toy for Early Learning
features: CLASSIC STACKING RING TOY: Introduce your little one to this wooden stacking ring toy from New Classic Toys.
LEARN THROUGH PLAY: This toy includes a stable base and a set of smooth, coloured rings that vary in size, helping children understand concepts like size, shape, and colour.

DEVELOPS MOTOR SKILLS: By engaging with this classic toy, children can develop essential fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination. The stacking process encourages problem-solving as children figure out the correct order of the rings, promoting cognitive development.

SUITABLE FOR AGES 1 AND BEYOND: This resistant stacking toy is made to be resilient, its long-lasting durability and safe play allow children to enjoy hours of delicious imaginative fun with confidence.

HIGH-QUALITY MATERIALS: Crafted from solid beechwood, this Stacking Rings set offers exceptional durability and resilience, ensuring it stands up to enthusiastic play while maintaining its charm and functionality over time.
description: Introduce your little one to this wooden stacking ring toy from New Classic Toys, made from beechwood. This toy includes a stable base and a set of smooth, colored rings that vary in size. Children can practice stacking the rings from largest to smallest, helping them to understand concepts like size, shape, and color. By engaging with this classic toy, children can develop essential fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination. The stacking process also encourages problem-solving as they figure out the correct order of the rings. Embark on a journey of good old-fashioned fun with this nostalgic rainbow stacker toy. Made from FSC® 100% certified wood.

specifications_table.Item Type Name: New Classic Toys - Stacking Rings - Wooden Stacking Toy - Made from Beechwood - Colourful and Smooth Rings - Fun and Educational Toy for Kids
